cpu.description: GCP n2d-standard-4 (4 vCPU, 16 GB). RAG stack running with documents ingested.

env: Linux host with Docker + Docker Compose plugin. RAG stack is running: rag-server at http://localhost:8081. Documents are ingested. Retrieval config is controlled via environment variables in deploy/compose/nvdev.env (APP_ENABLE_MULTITURN, APP_RETRIEVER_TOPK, etc.). cwd: ${RAG_REPO_ROOT}/.

expects.query: Use the rag-configure-retrieval skill to enable hybrid search on the running RAG deployment. Tell me whether existing documents need to be re-ingested after this change. The eval runs from inside the repository checkout; use git rev-parse --show-toplevel if you need the absolute path.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-configure-retrieval SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it identified the active deployment config file before making changes
The agent's trajectory shows it enabled hybrid search in the configuration
The agent's trajectory shows it restarted the affected service after the config change
The agent's final response states whether re-ingestion is required

expects.query: I want to query across multiple document collections at the same time and rank the results. How do I set this up?
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-configure-retrieval SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it referenced the multi-collection retrieval documentation
The agent's final response provides specific configuration steps for enabling multi-collection retrieval
The agent's final response explains reranking configuration alongside multi-collection setup

expects.query: My RAG search results are returning documents that don't seem relevant to the query at all. The collection has documents but the answers are off-topic.
checks: The agent's trajectory shows it read the rag-configure-retrieval SKILL.md before taking action
The agent's trajectory shows it checked current retrieval configuration settings
The agent's trajectory shows it ran a test query to inspect retrieved context quality
The agent's final response provides specific configuration changes to improve relevance (reranking, topK, search mode)

expects.query: Deploy the RAG Blueprint on this machine with Docker Compose.
checks: The agent's trajectory does NOT include any invocation of /rag-configure-retrieval (this is a deployment task)
The agent's trajectory shows it identified this as a deployment task requiring a different skill (rag-deploy-blueprint)
The agent's trajectory does NOT include any retrieval configuration changes
